message:
feat: add statistical optimization modules (bd-10ck, bd-14la, bd-22fb, bd-y6fw, bd-7nm3)

- validation_pipeline: Expected-cost ordering with Beta posteriors + early exit
- allocation_budget: Sequential leak detection via CUSUM + e-process
- fenwick: O(log n) Fenwick tree for prefix sums in virtualized lists
- height_predictor: Bayesian height prediction with conformal bounds
- hint_ranker: Utility-based keybinding hint ranking with VOI exploration

57 new tests across 5 modules, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
